title: Disposition of accumulated contributions upon retirement of employee
doc_html:
§951.45.  Disposition of accumulated contributions upon retirement of employee

Upon the retirement of a participant, his accumulated contributions shall be transferred from the annuity savings account to the annuity reserve account.

Redesignated from R.S. 17:1075 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.
doc_text:
§951.45.  Disposition of accumulated contributions upon retirement of employee
Upon the retirement of a participant, his accumulated contributions shall be transferred from the annuity savings account to the annuity reserve account.
Redesignated from R.S. 17:1075 pursuant to R.S. 24:253.
